mapper.insert:
insert into topic_attention
topicAttentionId,
observerId,
topicId,
attentionStatus,
reportType,
attentionDate,
#{topicAttentionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{observerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{attentionStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{reportType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{attentionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: select ui.userId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl from topic_attention ta inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ta.observerId where ta.topicId = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select ui.userId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, ui.sex, case when ua.attentionStatus = 1 then 1 else 0 END as attentionStatus from topic_attention ta inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ta.observerId left join user_attention ua on ua.attentedId = ta.observerId and ua.observerId = #{userId} where ta.topicId = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from topic_attention ta inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ta.observerId where ta.topicId = #{topicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
